requirements.title: Heap Initialization
requirements.description: The heap module shall initialize from a caller-provided backing array.
requirements.rationale: A priority queue is essential for scheduling and event-driven systems; initializing from a caller-provided array satisfies the zero-allocation constraint.

requirements.title: Heap Element Comparison Injection
requirements.description: The heap module shall accept an injected element pointer API with Compare and Swap operations.
requirements.rationale: Injecting Compare and Swap operations allows the heap to be generic over element type, supporting min-heaps, max-heaps, and custom orderings without code duplication.

requirements.title: Heap Insert
requirements.description: The heap shall insert an element and restore the heap property in O(log n) time.
requirements.rationale: O(log n) insertion maintains the heap property efficiently, providing predictable worst-case timing for real-time priority queue operations.

requirements.title: Heap Pop
requirements.description: The heap shall remove the root element and restore the heap property in O(log n) time.
requirements.rationale: O(log n) removal of the root element enables efficient extraction of the highest-priority item, which is the primary operation for priority-queue consumers.

requirements.title: Heap Pop Output
requirements.description: The heap Pop operation shall copy the removed root element into a caller-provided pointer descriptor.
requirements.rationale: Copying the removed element into a caller-provided descriptor ensures the caller receives the value without exposing internal array storage or requiring dynamic allocation for the output.

requirements.title: Heap Heapify
requirements.description: The heap shall transform the underlying array into a valid heap in O(n) time.
requirements.rationale: O(n) heapify enables efficient bulk construction of a heap from an existing array, which is asymptotically faster than n individual insertions.

requirements.title: Heap Vtable Validation
requirements.description: The heap module shall verify that the heap API vtable entries are non-null before each operation.
requirements.rationale: Validates the vtable at runtime to ensure memory safety before dispatching any heap operation through function pointers.

requirements.title: Heap Dependency Validation
requirements.description: The heap module shall verify that the backing array and heap pointer API dependencies are valid before each operation.
requirements.rationale: Validates the injected backing array and comparison API at runtime to catch misconfigured or partially initialized heap instances before they cause undefined behavior.
